parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "job_id": "render_{{$now.toFormat('yyyyLLdd_HHmmss')}}",
  "trace_id": "wf_{{$execution.id}}",
  "source_url": "https://example.com/source.mp4",
  "source_filename": "source.mp4",
  "source_video_path": "/data/input/source.mp4",
  "output_path": "/data/output/render_{{$execution.id}}/final.mp4",
  "log_dir": "/data/output/render_{{$execution.id}}",
  "notify_webhook_url": "https://example.com/webhook",
  "analyzer_url": "http://{{ $env.ANALYZER_HOST || 'media-worker-private-ip' }}:9010/analyze",
  "planner_url": "http://{{ $env.RENDER_HOST || 'media-worker-private-ip' }}:9020/plan",
  "renderer_url": "http://{{ $env.RENDER_HOST || 'media-worker-private-ip' }}:9020/render",
  "preset": {
    "platform": "tiktok",
    "target_aspect_ratio": "9:16",
    "target_duration_sec": 45,
    "max_scenes": 8,
    "prefer_hook_strength": true,
    "prefer_beat_sync": true,
    "allow_reorder": false,
    "caption_mode": "plan_only",
    "add_cta": true,
    "title_text": "Belajar kripto dari nol",
    "cta_text": "Save video ini"
  }
}

={
  "job_id": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.job_id,
  "trace_id": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.trace_id,
  "requested_by": "n8n-worker",
  "request_version": "2026-05-11.v1",
  "source_url": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.source_url,
  "source_filename": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.source_filename,
  "source_video_path": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.source_video_path,
  "output_path": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.output_path,
  "log_dir": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.log_dir,
  "notify_webhook_url": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.notify_webhook_url,
  "planner_url": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.planner_url,
  "renderer_url": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.renderer_url,
  "analysis": $json,
  "preset": $item(0).$node["Set Job Config"].json.preset
}

={
  "job_id": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.job_id,
  "trace_id": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.trace_id,
  "requested_by": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.requested_by,
  "request_version": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.request_version,
  "source_url": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.source_url,
  "source_filename": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.source_filename,
  "source_video_path": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.source_video_path,
  "output_path": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.output_path,
  "log_dir": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.log_dir,
  "notify_webhook_url": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.notify_webhook_url,
  "renderer_url": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.renderer_url,
  "analysis": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.analysis,
  "preset": $item(0).$node["Set Envelope After Analysis"].json.preset,
  "plan": $json,
  "dry_run": false
}

parameters.command: =test -f {{$item(0).$node["Set Render Payload"].json.output_path}} && echo output_saved || (echo output_missing && exit 1)

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "job_id": $item(0).$node["Set Render Payload"].json.job_id,
  "trace_id": $item(0).$node["Set Render Payload"].json.trace_id,
  "source_url": $item(0).$node["Set Render Payload"].json.source_url,
  "source_video_path": $item(0).$node["Set Render Payload"].json.source_video_path,
  "output_path": $item(0).$node["Set Render Payload"].json.output_path,
  "log_dir": $item(0).$node["Set Render Payload"].json.log_dir,
  "notify_webhook_url": $item(0).$node["Set Render Payload"].json.notify_webhook_url,
  "render_status": $item(0).$node["HTTP Render"].json.status,
  "manifest": $item(0).$node["HTTP Render"].json.manifest,
  "plan": $item(0).$node["HTTP Render"].json.plan,
  "saved_check": $json.stdout,
  "finished_at": "{{$now.toISO()}}",
  "log_b64": "{{ Buffer.from(JSON.stringify({ job_id: $item(0).$node[\"Set Render Payload\"].json.job_id, trace_id: $item(0).$node[\"Set Render Payload\"].json.trace_id, output_path: $item(0).$node[\"Set Render Payload\"].json.output_path, render_status: $item(0).$node[\"HTTP Render\"].json.status, manifest: $item(0).$node[\"HTTP Render\"].json.manifest, plan: $item(0).$node[\"HTTP Render\"].json.plan, finished_at: $now.toISO() }, null, 2)).toString(\"base64\") }}"
}
